banner.title: Welcome to Gautam Buddha University
banner.content: Empowering minds, shaping futures through excellence in education, research, and innovation.

about.title: About Gautam Buddha University
about.description:
Established in 2008, Gautam Buddha University stands as a beacon of academic excellence in the National Capital Region. Named after Lord Buddha, the university embodies the principles of knowledge, wisdom, and enlightenment.

With state-of-the-art infrastructure, world-class faculty, and innovative research programs, GBU is committed to nurturing global citizens who can contribute meaningfully to society and the nation.

leadership.title: Visionary Leadership
leadership.name: Dr. Rana P. Singh
leadership.message: Dr. Singh is an expert in stem cell research, tumor biology, and space medicine. With over 20 years in academia, he leads GBU with a commitment to interdisciplinary education.

leadership.title: Visionary Leadership
leadership.name: Shri Yogi Adityanath
leadership.message: A visionary leader guiding GBU with a focus on holistic development and academic excellence. He emphasizes blending Indian knowledge systems with modern education.

Australian Delegation Visited Gautam Buddha University (GBU) for Strengthening  Activities in the areas of Education, Training and Research.

excellence_in_education.title: Artificial Intelligence Center
excellence_in_education.content_text: Cutting-edge research in machine learning, deep learning, and AI applications across various domains.

excellence_in_education.title: Drone Technology Hub
excellence_in_education.content_text: Advanced drone research facility focusing on autonomous systems and aerial robotics.

excellence_in_education.title: Cybersecurity Institute
excellence_in_education.content_text: State-of-the-art cybersecurity research and training center for digital security solutions.

excellence_in_education.title: Bioinformatics Lab
excellence_in_education.content_text: Pioneering research at the intersection of biology and computational science.

excellence_in_education.title: Materials Research Facility
excellence_in_education.content_text: Innovative lab exploring new materials and nanotechnology applications.

excellence_in_education.title: High Performance Computing Center
excellence_in_education.content_text: Robust computational infrastructure supporting large-scale data processing.

excellence_in_education.title: Smart Campus Network
excellence_in_education.content_text: IoT-enabled infrastructure for real-time campus monitoring and management.

campus_life.title: Campus Life at GBU
campus_life.description: GBU has smart classrooms, libraries, labs, mentoring, and career support.

campus_life.title: Campus Life at GBU
campus_life.description: GBU has modern sports facilities, grounds, courts, gyms, and indoor stadiums.

campus_life.title: Campus Life at GBU
campus_life.description: GBU hosts theatres and festivals like Youth Fest, promoting music, dance, drama, and arts.

campus_life.title: Campus Life at GBU
campus_life.description: GBU offers secure hostels with Wi-Fi, hygienic food, medical aid, and recreation lounges.
campus_life.card_content: Hostel Life - GBU offers secure and well-maintained hostel facilities designed to feel like a home away from home. Students enjoy uninterrupted high-speed Wi-Fi for studies and leisure, clean and nutritious meals prepared in hygienic kitchens, prompt medical aid available at all hours, and lively recreation lounges where they can relax, socialize, and build lasting memories.

virtual_experience.title: Experience GBU in 360 degree
virtual_experience.desc: Take an immersive 360-degree tour of our state-of-the-art facilities, beautiful campus grounds, and modern infrastructure. Explore every corner of our world-class university from anywhere in the world.
